_metadata.description: Complete NAICS and HTS/Schedule B code registry for grain and oilseed supply chain

crop_production.111199: All Other Grain Farming (sorghum, barley, oats)

postharvest_elevator_services.115114: Postharvest Crop Activities (country elevators — primary grain handling NAICS)

grain_storage_wholesale.493130: Farm Product Warehousing and Storage (terminal/export elevators)
grain_storage_wholesale.424510: Grain and Field Bean Merchant Wholesalers
grain_storage_wholesale.424590: Other Farm Product Raw Material Merchant Wholesalers

grain_processing.311211: Flour Milling (wheat flour; primary wheat domestic use)
grain_processing.311221: Wet Corn Milling and Starch Manufacturing (ethanol, HFCS)
grain_processing.311224: Soybean and Other Oilseed Processing (soy crush — meal + oil)
grain_processing.311225: Fats and Oils Refining and Blending (refined soy oil)
grain_processing.311111: Dog and Cat Food Manufacturing (grain inputs)
grain_processing.311119: Other Animal Food Manufacturing (feed mills — grain inputs)

transportation.482111: Line-Haul Railroads (Class I — BNSF, UP, CN, CP, CSX, NS)
transportation.482112: Short Line Railroads (grain collection — first leg)

port_services.488390: Other Support Activities for Water Transportation

corn.1005900020: Yellow corn for grain (primary US export/import code)

wheat.1001990010: Hard Red Winter (HRW) wheat — other than seed
wheat.1001990020: Soft Red Winter (SRW) wheat — other than seed
wheat.1001990030: Hard Red Spring (HRS) wheat — other than seed

soybeans.1201900005: Soybeans — other than seed (primary trade code)

processed_grain_byproducts.2302400000: Bran and residues of other cereals
processed_grain_byproducts.2303100040: DDGS — distillers dried grains with solubles (primary)
processed_grain_byproducts.2304001000: Soybean meal (oilcake from soybean solvent extraction)

oilseed_oils.1512110000: Crude sunflower seed or safflower oil
oilseed_oils.1514110000: Crude rapeseed (canola) oil — low erucic acid

schedule_b_export_codes.note: Schedule B codes are the U.S. export classification system (aligned with HS)

corn.1005900020: Yellow dent corn for grain — primary U.S. bulk export code

wheat.1001990010: Hard Red Winter (HRW) wheat — Southern/Central Plains export
wheat.1001990020: Soft Red Winter (SRW) wheat — Midwest/Gulf/Atlantic export
wheat.1001990030: Hard Red Spring (HRS) wheat — Northern Plains/PNW export
wheat.1001990040: White wheat — Pacific Northwest export to Asia

soybeans.1201900005: Soybeans for crushing and other use — primary bulk export

sorghum.1007900010: Grain sorghum — Texas Gulf exports (predominantly to China)

ddgs.2303100040: DDGS — primary corn ethanol byproduct export

esr_weekly_export_sales.note: Used in FAS OpenData ESR API

psd_supply_demand.note: Used in FAS OpenData PSD API

stcc_rail_codes.note: Standard Transportation Commodity Code (STB/AAR) for rail waybill data

usace_waterborne_commerce_codes.note: USACE commodity classification for waterborne tonnage data

nass_commodity_descriptions.note: Exact strings for USDA NASS QuickStats API commodity_desc parameter

cme_futures_tickers.note: CME Group continuous front-month contract tickers
